## Houston 0.5.5

### Houston is moving to the cloud

The new Houston runs in the cloud, and it brings your whole workspace with you: your agents, their skills and learnings, your routines, your files, and your full chat history.

### What happens when you open it

- **Your data is backed up first.** Before anything moves, Houston saves a full copy of your current data, so your old app keeps working just as it did.
- **Your agents and chats come across.** Every agent moves with its history, so you can pick up your conversations right where you left off.
- **You reconnect your AI once.** The cloud runs on a new engine, so you sign in to your AI provider again the first time. It only takes a minute.
- **Your apps reconnect too.** Anything you had linked, like Gmail or Calendar, shows up as a short list so you can switch it back on.

### Why the cloud

Your agents keep working even when your computer is asleep or closed, and you can reach them from anywhere.

### Before you upgrade

- **Mac:** quit Houston before installing. macOS does not always replace a running app cleanly. If in doubt, remove /Applications/Houston.app and drag the new copy in.
- **No rush.** If now is not a good time, choose Migrate later and finish whenever you want from Settings. Your old data stays safe either way.
